headline: Oppenheimer turns cautious on major U.S. banks, favors alternative asset managers
summary: Investing.com -- Oppenheimer downgraded several large U.S. bank stocks on Tuesday, arguing that rich valuations have left little room for further upside despite improving earnings prospects and a favorable operating environment.

raw.headline: Oppenheimer turns cautious on major U.S. banks, favors alternative asset managers
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Oppenheimer downgraded several large U.S. bank stocks on Tuesday, arguing that rich valuations have left little room for further upside despite improving earnings prospects and a favorable operating environment.

headline: 1 Core Catalyst Makes U.S. Bancorp a Premier Safe Haven for Retirees Protecting Their Future
summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) has paid uninterrupted dividends for over 160 years and was one of the few large banks that did not cut during the 2008 financial crisis. With shares up 40.04% over the past year, the question for income investors is whether the current $0.52 quarterly payout is built to last. Dividend Snapshot Metric ... 1 Core Catalyst Makes U.S. Bancorp a Premier Safe Haven for Retirees Protecting Their Future

headline: U.S. Bank Survey: 67% of Parents Talk Money Before Age 12, But Still Need Tools to Take Action
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 30, 2026--U.S. Bank survey reveals earlier, more open money conversations at home, but gap remains in taking action.

headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on U.S. Bancorp, Lowers Price Target to $73
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Chris Kotowski   maintains U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $74 to $73.

headline: CBSH Arm to Buy Nolan & Associates, Expand Advisory Capabilities
summary: Commerce Bancshares' planned Nolan & Associates buyout strengthens its middle-market IB reach and expands advisory capabilities for business owners.
